name: Wolfhouse Staff Ask Luna - WhatsApp Dry Run

meta.description: Stage 8.6.3 dry-run workflow. INACTIVE / NOT IMPORTED into production n8n. Staff WhatsApp -> POST /staff/ask-luna (source:staff_whatsapp, phone allowlist auth) -> draft/log answer. No live WhatsApp send. No graph.facebook.com send node. No Stripe. No DB writes. Phone allowlist: config/clients/wolfhouse-somo.staff-whatsapp-allowlist.json. Unauthorized (403) -> logs 'not enabled' draft, no send. unsupported_intent -> logs suggestions, no send. Dry-run guard: workflow JSON dry_run:true / live_send_enabled:false (no $env; staging blocks env access in node expressions).

parameters.responseBody: ={ "error": "dry_run_guard_blocked", "detail": "dry_run is not true; refusing to run staff ask-luna dry-run", "whatsapp_sent": false }

values.name: answer
values.stringValue: This number is not enabled for Staff Ask Luna.

values.name: reply_draft
values.stringValue: This number is not enabled for Staff Ask Luna.
